ham.subject: Out of Office: Priya Sharma – Back 12 May
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I am currently out of the office and will return on 12 May 2024.
During this period, I will have limited access to email.
For any urgent matters, please contact my colleague Rajesh Patel at r.patel@example.com or call the office line at +91-1234-567890.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Priya Sharma

spam.subject: URGENT: Income Tax Refund Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

Kripya aapko jankari dene mein humein khushi ho rahi hai ki aap FY 2023-24 ke liye INR 5,00,000 ka tax refund paane ke yogya hain.

Apne refund ka daava karne ke liye, kripya apni details verify karein aur official portal <URL> par jaa kar form bharain.

Agar aap 7 din ke andar verify nahi karte hain, to aapka refund roka ja sakta hai. Is email ka reply na karein.

Kisi bhi prashn ke liye, Income Tax Department ko 1800-202-2020 par call karein.

Dhanyavaad, 

Regards,
Income Tax Department
